# Security Policy

Security vulnerabilities related to Superset core should follow the instructions within Apache Superset's [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/apache/superset/blob/master/.github/SECURITY.md) file. 

## Reporting Vulnerabilities

**⚠️ Please do not file GitHub issues for security vulnerabilities as they are public! ⚠️**

Please only report security vulnerabilities pertaining to GeoSet functionality. Send an email to `ebienstock@teamraft.com` describing the vulnerability and we'll reach out shortly.
